positive: Stylized minimalist design featuring a majestic owl perched on a glowing crescent moon, surrounded by abstract geometric foliage and celestial constellations. The style should be neo-art deco meets ethereal watercolor, using deep indigo, emerald green, and antique gold accents. Focus on clean, strong silhouette outlines against a slightly darker background for maximum contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical. Include detailed pattern elements suitable for repeating seamless print on apparel. Cinematic lighting, high contrast, vector artwork quality, clean lines, 8k resolution, perfect symmetry, high detail.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, low detail, graffiti, messy, photorealism, gradient, faded
